name: CG Oncology Inc. Common stock
summary: CG Oncology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing oncolytic immunotherapies for cancer treatment. Their lead product candidate is cretostimogene grenadenorepvec, an oncolytic adenovirus being evaluated for the treatment of high-risk, BCG-unresponsive non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC). The company is headquartered in Irvine, California.
